name: kxco-pq-cli
description: CLI for KXCO post-quantum institution key management: generate ML-DSA-65 keypairs, rotate keys with optional on-chain anchoring, sign files, and verify signatures without writing any code.
author: Shayne Heffernan and John Heffernan

scripts.test: node --test test/jcs.test.js test/manifest.test.js test/keygen.test.js test/fingerprint.test.js test/rotate.test.js test/attest.test.js
scripts.lint: node -c bin/kxco-pq.js && node -c src/cli.js && node -c src/jcs.js && node -c src/manifest.js && node -c src/commands/keygen.js && node -c src/commands/fingerprint.js && node -c src/commands/rotate.js
